hero.title: Shaping a sustainable and resilient future.
hero.subtitle: A leader in engineering, consulting, and design, we transform complex challenges into innovative opportunities for our clients and society.

about.title: Our Business
about.content1: Since 1989, CEEB has possessed unique expertise in the field of electrical engineering, high-voltage and low-voltage systems, and communication systems. CEEB primarily works on sensitive projects: airports, courthouses, embassies, etc.
about.content2:
Today, CEEB carries out projects across all technical trades with a constant focus on quality. Its technical and human resources, always at the forefront of innovation, guarantee a very high level of service.

Anticipation and adaptability are the core values of our employees. They must reinvent themselves every day, remaining curious about best practices and new technologies.

Proximity, availability, and responsiveness are the cornerstones of CEEB.

CEEB is a human-sized company that has the resources and ambitions of a large company.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: We support companies with tailor-made engineering, consulting, and project management solutions.

engineering.title: Electricity - Systems
engineering.desc2:
On-site surveys, network identification
High-voltage substations, main distribution boards
Equipment definition, calculation notes, BMS, CAD/CAM
Site layouts, distribution diagrams, routes, summary
Renewable energy and sustainable development, HVAC, plumbing, utilities, special fluids and gases
engineering.desc3:
Low Voltage and Communication Systems
Diagnosis of existing installations
Site Protection Studies
Video surveillance, cable television, VDI, public address system
Access control and intrusion detection
Intercom and video intercom
Detection, BMS, fire alarm control
Technical alarms
engineering.desc4:
CAD/CAM, Information Technology
Functional analysis
Study and design of systems
Human-computer interface (HCI)
3D/4D Modeling

projectManagement.title: Project Management
projectManagement.desc1: We offer comprehensive project management services from planning to delivery.
projectManagement.desc2: We coordinate stakeholders, schedules, budgets, and technical resources efficiently.
projectManagement.desc3: Our teams ensure quality, compliance, risk control, and successful project execution.

audit.title: Audit & Consulting
audit.desc: We conduct technical audits, performance evaluations, and risk analyses.

communication.title: Communication
communication.desc: We develop communication strategies to engage stakeholders and promote projects.

elearning.title: E-learning
elearning.desc: We create customized e-learning solutions for organizations.

digital.title: Digital Solutions
digital.desc: We develop innovative digital solutions including BIM, analytics, and AI.
